# Privacy

> **Feature delivered — acceptance criteria.** Generated from the as-built BDD tests in
> `test/stories/privacy_story_test.exs`. Every scenario below is an ExUnit test driving the
> real Codemojex game, so the catalogue cannot drift from the code.

**3 scenarios.**

## Scenario: the game view never carries the secret

- **Given** an open game whose secret was minted server-side
- **When** the client fetches the game view
- **Then** there is no :secret key anywhere in the view — only the keyboard snapshot

## Scenario: a player's history shows only their own attempts

- **Given** both players have submitted a guess
- **When** Alice reads her history
- **Then** she sees her own guess and nothing of Bob's

## Scenario: the leaderboard exposes scores, never guess content

- **Given** a scored attempt on the board
- **When** the leaderboard is read
- **Then** every row is a {player, score} pair with no emojis attached
